root_text.sn33.5:1.2: Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho vacchagotto paribbājako bhagavantaṁ etadavoca:
root_text.sn33.5:1.3: “ko nu kho, bho gotama, hetu, ko paccayo, yānimāni anekavihitāni diṭṭhigatāni loke uppajjanti—
root_text.sn33.5:1.4: sassato lokoti vā, asassato lokoti vā …pe…
root_text.sn33.5:1.5: neva hoti na na hoti tathāgato paraṁ maraṇāti vā”ti?
root_text.sn33.5:1.6: “Viññāṇe kho, vaccha, aññāṇā, viññāṇasamudaye aññāṇā, viññāṇanirodhe aññāṇā, viññāṇanirodhagāminiyā paṭipadāya aññāṇā;
root_text.sn33.5:1.8: sassato lokoti vā, asassato lokoti vā …pe…
root_text.sn33.5:1.9: neva hoti na na hoti tathāgato paraṁ maraṇāti vāti.
root_text.sn33.5:1.10: Ayaṁ kho, vaccha, hetu, ayaṁ paccayo, yānimāni anekavihitāni diṭṭhigatāni loke uppajjanti—
root_text.sn33.5:1.11: sassato lokoti vā, asassato lokoti vā …pe…
root_text.sn33.5:1.12: neva hoti na na hoti tathāgato paraṁ maraṇāti vā”ti.

translation_text.sn33.5:1.2: Then the wanderer Vacchagotta said to the Buddha:
translation_text.sn33.5:1.3: “What is the cause, worthy Gotama, what is the reason why these various misconceptions arise in the world? …”
translation_text.sn33.5:1.6: “Vaccha, it is because of not knowing consciousness, its origin, its cessation, and the practice that leads to its cessation …”
